categories.label: Constructed Buildings
categories.description: Points from constructed buildings as printed on Player Board (Workshops: 3/5, Trading Posts: 4/9/15, Guildhalls: 5/4/9/15)

categories.label: Workers in the Castle
categories.description: Each worker scores VP equal to its tier in the Castle (1st tier = 1 VP, 2nd tier = 2 VP, 3rd tier = 3 VP)

categories.label: Transcribed Manuscripts
categories.description: VP from manuscript sets of different ribbon colours (1=1, 2=4, 3=9) plus VP printed on specific manuscripts

categories.label: Castle Leader Card
categories.description: 5 VP if you hold the Castle Leader Card at game end

categories.label: Cleric Bonus Cards
categories.description: 3 VP each for Cleric Bonus Cards (first to collect 3 manuscripts of same ribbon colour)

categories.label: Unpaid Debts
categories.description: -2 VP for each unpaid (unflipped) Debt card

categories.label: Acquired Deeds
categories.description: 1 VP for each acquired (unflipped) Deed card

categories.label: Approved Deeds
categories.description: 3 VP for each approved (flipped) Deed card

categories.label: Poverty Card Bonus
categories.description: If Poverty Card revealed: most flipped Deeds scores 12, second 8, third 4 VP

categories.label: Prosperity Card Bonus
categories.description: If Prosperity Card revealed: most flipped Debts scores 12, second 8, third 4 VP
